name: Kamat Hotels (India) Limited
summary: Kamat Hotels (India) Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the hospitality business in India. It operates hotels and resorts under the brands, such as The Orchid, Fort Jadhavgadh, and Lotus Konark Resorts, as well as Mahodadhi Palace. The company also operates restaurants; and provides hotel consultancy, setups, and other related services. Kamat Hotels (India) Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Mumbai, India.
